title: bursera pilosa
intro: Bursera pilosa is a species of tree native to the tropical regions of Central and South America, belonging to the family Burseraceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits associated with Bursera pilosa include relief from fever, pain, and inflammation, as well as its use in treating respiratory and digestive problems. The plant is typically prepared as a tea or infusion by steeping its bark or leaves in hot water, and can also be used in the form of a tincture or decoction for its medicinal benefits.
